
HPE Smart Array P816i-a SR Gen10 in Slot 0 (Embedded)

   Array A

      physicaldrive 4I:6:1
         Port: 4I
         Box: 6
         Bay: 1
         Status: OK
         Drive Type: Data Drive
         Interface Type: Solid State SAS
         Size: 800 GB
         Drive exposed to OS: False
         Logical/Physical Block Size: 512/4096
         Firmware Revision: HPD1

         Current Temperature (C): 51
         Maximum Temperature (C): 58
         Usage remaining: 93.35%
         Power On Hours: 28293

         SSD Smart Trip Wearout: False
         PHY Count: 2
         PHY Transfer Rate: 12.0Gbps, Unknown
         PHY Physical Link Rate: 12.0Gbps, Unknown
         PHY Maximum Link Rate: 12.0Gbps, 12.0Gbps
         Drive Authentication Status: OK
         Carrier Application Version: 11
         Carrier Bootloader Version: 6
         Sanitize Erase Supported: True
         Sanitize Estimated Max Erase Time: 10 minute(s), 0 second(s) 
         Unrestricted Sanitize Supported: False
         Shingled Magnetic Recording Support: None
         Drive Unique ID: 5000CCA0B8712794
         Multi-Actuator Drive: False
